title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
summary: 一个提供多种AI代理的GitHub仓库，涵盖前端开发、社交媒体管理、创意生成等专业领域。
translated_summary: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.
